name: Sawtooth Lake Trail
address: Iron Creek Trailhead, Iron Creek Rd, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A classic Sawtooth hike leading through forest and alpine terrain to a large mountain lake beneath jagged peaks.

name: Goat Lake Trail
address: Iron Creek Trailhead, Iron Creek Rd, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A scenic alpine hike to a striking blue lake surrounded by steep rocky walls in the Sawtooth Range.

name: Alice Lake Trail
address: Tin Cup Trailhead, Forest Rd 214, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A beautiful mountain trail that climbs past streams and wildflowers to a famous alpine lake basin.

name: Pettit Lake to Twin Lakes
address: Pettit Lake Trailhead, Forest Rd 208, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A popular Sawtooth trail with forested sections, creek crossings, and views of dramatic granite peaks.

name: Hell Roaring Lake Trail
address: Hell Roaring Lake Trailhead, Forest Rd 314, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A relatively accessible hike to a gorgeous mountain lake with broad views and good fishing access.

name: Fishhook Creek Trail
address: Fishhook Creek Trailhead, Forest Rd 619, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A mellow creekside hike with mountain views, meadows, and excellent wildflower displays in summer.

name: Pioneer Cabin Trail
address: Long Gulch Trailhead, Corral Creek Rd, Ketchum, ID 83340
description: A steady climb to a historic mountain cabin with sweeping views of the Pioneer Mountains.

name: Toxaway Lake Loop
address: Tin Cup Trailhead, Forest Rd 214, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A longer loop passing multiple alpine lakes, streams, and high mountain scenery in the Sawtooths.

name: Mount Borah Trail
address: Borah Peak Trailhead, Mount Borah Rd, Mackay, ID 83251
description: Idaho’s highest peak, featuring steep climbing, major elevation gain, and exposed scrambling sections.

name: Table Rock Trail
address: Old Penitentiary Trailhead, 2445 E Old Penitentiary Rd, Boise, ID 83712
description: A popular Boise foothills hike with city views and a straightforward climb to the Table Rock overlook.

name: Hulls Gulch Interpretive Trail
address: Camel's Back Reserve Trailhead, 1200 Heron St, Boise, ID 83702
description: A Boise favorite with rolling foothill terrain, seasonal wildflowers, and views over the Treasure Valley.

name: Stack Rock Trail
address: Stack Rock Trailhead, Bogus Basin Rd, Boise, ID 83702
description: A longer foothills hike to a striking granite formation with broad views of the surrounding mountains.

name: Tubbs Hill Loop
address: Tubbs Hill Trailhead, 210 S 3rd St, Coeur d'Alene, ID 83814
description: An easy scenic loop above Lake Coeur d'Alene with shoreline views, rocky outcrops, and forested paths.

name: Mickinnick Trail
address: 400 Woodland Dr, Sandpoint, ID 83864
description: A steep but rewarding hike above Sandpoint with granite features and panoramic views over Lake Pend Oreille.

name: Blue Lake Trail
address: Blue Lake Trailhead, ID-75 near Ketchum, ID 83340
description: A shorter alpine hike to a bright mountain lake surrounded by forest and rocky slopes.

name: Duck Lake Trail
address: Duck Lake Trailhead, near Stanley Lake, Stanley, ID 83278
description: A gentle family-friendly trail through meadows and forest to a peaceful alpine lake.

name: Palisades Creek Trail
address: Palisades Creek Trailhead, Palisades Creek Rd, Irwin, ID 83428
description: A scenic creekside trail with forest, canyon views, and access to lower alpine lakes.

name: Creekside Towers Trail
address: City of Rocks National Reserve, Almo, ID 83312
description: A short hike through impressive granite formations and open high-desert scenery in southern Idaho.

name: Pyramid and Ball Lakes Trail
address: Trailhead near Priest Lake, Bonners Ferry, ID 83805
description: A northern Idaho alpine hike through forest and meadows to two scenic mountain lakes.

name: Saint Mary Peak Trail
address: St. Mary Peak Trailhead, near Kooskia, ID 83539
description: A strenuous wilderness hike to a summit and lookout with expansive views across the Bitterroot region.
